GetMeIn

★3.9/5(12,300 reviews)· Est. 2007

About GetMeIn

GetMeIn is a UK-based ticket exchange platform with a strong focus on sports events. Backed by Ticketmaster, it offers a reliable secondary market for UK sports, concert and theatre tickets with robust buyer protection.

Key Features

✓UK-focused inventory
✓Ticketmaster-backed security
✓Strong UK sports coverage
✓Price drop alerts
✓Secure transactions
✓Easy ticket transfer

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros
  • +UK-specific inventory
  • +Trustworthy Ticketmaster backing
  • +Competitive UK sports pricing
⚠️ Cons
  • –Limited international coverage
  • –Fewer events than global platforms
Visit their official site to browse tickets:
Visit GetMeIn →

The UK's leading sports ticket comparison site. We help fans find the best prices from trusted resale platforms — so you never overpay for a seat.
